title: cirsium luzoniense
intro: Cirsium luzoniense, also known as Luzon thistle or Luzon milk thistle, is a species of thistle native to the Philippines. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties attributed to its ability to stimulate liver function and protect against liver damage. The plant's health benefits include its potential to treat liver disorders, such as hepatitis, and its antioxidant properties, which may help reduce inflammation and improve overall health. Cirsium luzoniense is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its extracts are used in various medicinal formulations, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
